heading: Payments and reimbursements for certain House staff expenses
label: 5344 Payments and reimbursements for certain House staff expenses
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 43b–3 of this titleSection is based on section 2 of House Resolution No. 10, Ninety-fourth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Jan. 14, 1975Pub. L. 94–59
Amendments1996— substituted “House Oversight” for “House Administration” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 104–186

Change of NameCommittee on House Oversight of House of Representatives changed to Committee on House Administration of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Sixth Congress, .Jan. 6, 1999
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “House Oversight” for “House Administration” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 104–186

children.label: a
children.text: Payments and reimbursements to staff persons under shall be made as provided (with respect to staff) in the regulations prescribed by the Committee on House Oversight with respect to travel and other expenses of staff. Reimbursements shall be paid on special voucher forms prescribed by the Committee on House Oversight.section 5343 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Additional funds, if any, for staff allowances and office space for use by Members-elect (other than an incumbent Member reelected to the ensuing Congress) shall be authorized by the Committee on House Oversight.
